author: opus-orchestrator <t@t.com>
body:
## Findings

`parent_matches` signature changed from `&Option<IssueId>` to
`Option<&IssueId>`. The two call sites (`run_ls` at line 3785,
`run_search` at line 4074) updated to pass `parent_id.as_ref()`.

## Recommendation

Done inline — no separate subagent. 3-line mechanical refactor.

## Confidence

High. `cargo nextest run --workspace` → 638/638 pass.
`cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets` shows no `ref_option`
warnings (6 pre-existing unrelated warnings remain, unchanged).

## Open follow-ups

None for this ticket. The 6 pre-existing clippy warnings are
out of scope (manual_contains, etc.) — file separately if we
want a clippy-cleanup pass.
